programme.title: Hot Copy on Headstart with Karen Davila
Karate Kid: Legends
programme.desc: After a family tragedy, kung fu prodigy Li Fong is uprooted from his home in Beijing and forced to move to New York City with his mother. When a new friend needs his help, Li enters a karate competition – but his skills alone aren't enough. Li's kung fu teacher Mr. Han enlists original Karate Kid Daniel LaRusso for help, and Li learns a new way to fight, merging their two styles into one for the ultimate martial arts showdown.

programme.title: In My Life
programme.desc: An aging librarian, feeling abandoned by her children who've all moved abroad, travels to New York to spend time with her gay son. There, she tries to start a new life while reconnecting with her son and his new lover. But just as things turn around, she finds out that her son has been keeping a secret from her.

programme.title: Sta. Nina
programme.desc: A man finds the coffin of his daughter who died ten years ago buried in lahar. Much to his surprise, the body has not decomposed. He brings the coffin back to his home, and it soon becomes the center of worship for a town hungry for a miracle.

programme.title: Last Night
programme.desc: It centers on Mark and Carmina who first meet unexpectedly. They then discover they stay at the same hotel and have the same fate, both attempting to commit suicide. In the process of getting to know each other, they start a friendship and eventually becomes attached with each other.

programme.title: Kuwaresma
programme.desc: It centers on a family who is haunted by what appears to be the ghost of their youngest daughter.

programme.title: All My Life
programme.desc: In the wake of a tragedy, two lovers reconsider their decision to be together.

programme.title: Jean Perera: The Beauty Queen Murder
Cold Case Files: Murder In The Bayou

News
programme.desc: Watch the latest international top stories, The News every 30 minutes with the emphasis on debate, dialogue, role of cultural differences, analytics of key events all over the world, comments, hot topics of the day, reports.

programme.title: News
programme.desc: Watch the latest international top stories, The News every 30 minutes with the emphasis on debate, dialogue, role of cultural differences, analytics of key events all over the world, comments, hot topics of the day, reports.

programme.title: Arts24
programme.desc: Daily international culture news from the world's art, food and fashion capital, Paris.

programme.title: News
programme.desc: Watch the latest international top stories, The News every 30 minutes with the emphasis on debate, dialogue, role of cultural differences, analytics of key events all over the world, comments, hot topics of the day, reports.

programme.title: French Connections
programme.desc: French Connections revolves around France, its top stories and news, its experience in various spheres and cultural life, sport events, health care and education, cuisine and so much more. Find out what is like to live in France, get to know its regions, and feel the true taste of France.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: Headlines
programme.desc: Interesting programme that gives viewers a chance to find out more and review the latest press titles from around the world.

programme.title: News
programme.desc: Watch the latest international top stories, The News every 30 minutes with the emphasis on debate, dialogue, role of cultural differences, analytics of key events all over the world, comments, hot topics of the day, reports.

programme.title: Spotlight
programme.desc: Prime time interview of the day goes beyond the headlines: join us as news-making guests from around the globe go in depth on the stories that matter.

programme.title: News
programme.desc: Watch the latest international top stories, The News every 30 minutes with the emphasis on debate, dialogue, role of cultural differences, analytics of key events all over the world, comments, hot topics of the day, reports.

programme.title: Business
programme.desc: Business on France 24 gives you a perfect chance to get the business updates as they come and to be up to speed on international finances and economics. Business keeps you posted on everything that really matters in our fast moving world.

programme.title: Sports
programme.desc: A summary of world sports news of the day, both on and off the pitch.

programme.title: News
programme.desc: Watch the latest international top stories, The News every 30 minutes with the emphasis on debate, dialogue, role of cultural differences, analytics of key events all over the world, comments, hot topics of the day, reports.

programme.title: The Debate
programme.desc: Live debate show on the key topic of the day with four guests from different spots of the globe, from Monday to Thursday. Keep up with up-to-date issues from all over the world in politics, culture, sports, economy and healthcare. Get the latest facts and expert opinions about the most essential stories happening around us and draw your own conclusions. programme.title: Maging Sino ka Man: Ang Pagbabalik
Worldbreaker
programme.desc: Five years ago, a tear in the fabric of reality brought creatures to our world from an alternate dimension bent on our destruction. A father hides his daughter on an island to keep her safe while he prepares her for survival and the battles to come. But when the world is about to break, no place is safe.

programme.title: I Still Believe
programme.desc: Still Believe is an upcoming Christian biographical drama film directed by the Erwin Brothers and based on the life of singer-songwriter Jeremy Camp and his first wife, Melissa Lynn Henning-Camp, who was diagnosed with ovarian cancer shortly before they married.

programme.title: An Inconvenient Love
programme.desc: Ayef meets Manny. It is at a time where she focuses on her dreams while Manny being a flighty young shop owner, goes with the flow. They both believe love is inconvenient and agree to a contractual fling expiring on the date Ayef leaves for Singapore, but they start falling for one another.

programme.title: Conclave
programme.desc: After the unexpected death of the Pope, Cardinal Lawrence is tasked with managing the covert and ancient ritual of electing a new one. Sequestered in the Vatican with the Catholic Church’s most powerful leaders until the process is complete, Lawrence finds himself at the center of a conspiracy that could lead to its downfall.

programme.title: Till I Met You
programme.desc: Three friends — Iris, a girl; Basti, a boy; and Ali, a closeted homosexual — eventually fall in love with each other and find themselves in an unusual love triangle.

programme.title: Fantastica
programme.desc: Belat, her mother Fec and adopted siblings Daks, Pepe and Junjun face the possibility of being evicted from their land as they struggle to save their carnival. Hoping to prevent the carnival from closing, they turn to Prince, a man from Belat`s past, for help. He promises to give them a hand if they first help him look for the lost princesses Rapunselya, Maulan and Ariella so they can save the magical land, Fantastica.

programme.title: Girlfriend Na Pwede Na
programme.desc: Pam has been waiting for her boyfriend of seven years to propose, only to discover that he thinks that she's not yet the one.

programme.title: Who's That Girl?
programme.desc: A young successful career woman and her longtime crush get caught up in a complicated case of mistaken identity. As they try to undo their mistakes, the two end up finding a real connection.
